truth_owner: npcink-ai-cloud service runtime and operator surfaces
fail_closed_expectation: email, branding, and cookie cleanup must not create a second control plane; if service settings are incomplete, Portal email delivery and admin/portal sessions fail closed through existing auth and settings validation
description: Release-readiness cleanup before first real users: improve Portal email templates and preview, simplify admin service-settings email UI, update visible Npcink branding, migrate runtime cookie names from magick_* to npcink_*, and refresh local script env var names. Cloud remains the hosted runtime/service-detail layer and does not take WordPress write, approval, ability, workflow, prompt, router, MCP, or OpenClaw truth.
operator_note: This standalone repository does not expose a check:risk script; current local substitutes run in this session are check:fast, check:perimeter, check:release-policy, targeted backend/frontend tests, target ESLint, i18n contract, diff check, residual scans, and browser/curl cookie smoke. Run smoke:local-alpha against the intended environment before production promotion.
